objective: Verify that the CART-B01 save() bug fix is correctly implemented by confirming mkdirSync static import and absence of await in save(), then run build/test/lint gates
key_changes: Manual code review of src/store/graph.ts confirms mkdirSync is statically imported from 'fs' at module top level
Manual code review confirms save() function signature is non-async: fn save(graph: Graph): void
Manual code review confirms no await keywords in save() function body
npm run build completes successfully - TypeScript compiles to dist/ without errors
npm test passes all 31 tests including CART-B01 regression guard (mkdirSync called before writeFileSync)
npm run lint completes with no errors or warnings
Update CLAUDE.md known-issues section with verification success note
